parents.subject: LU-19919 utils: add missing IB LND tunable handling

commit.subject: LU-18847 mdt: cleanup reint structs
commit.message:
LU-18847 mdt: cleanup reint structs

mdt_rec_reint fields rr_fsgid_h, rr_fsuid_h and others were
reserved for sub-tenants in Solaris, they have never been used.
This patch removes unused fields. wiretest is regenerated by
wirecheck.

Signed-off-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ied2a2fcac20ad968030dcb9af142be9985865066
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64889
Reviewed-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
